title: Driver (East and West Area)
description:
🚛🌿 Join Our Green Movement: Plant Nurturer (Driver) Wanted! 🌿🚛


Love the open road and working with nature?

At OneO2Plants, we deliver life, beauty, and greenery everywhere — and we're looking for passionate individuals to drive this mission forward!


About the Role

We’re seeking a reliable and energetic Plant Nurturer (Driver) to join our team at 20 Jalan Lekar, or our team at 4A Bedok South Road. If you enjoy driving, working outdoors, and being part of a growing green movement, this opportunity is for you!


Key Responsibilities

🚛 Transport workers and goods safely to various sites

🚛 Secure heavy and large loads properly for transport

🚛 Plan and organize the most efficient delivery routes

🚛 Manage multiple pickups and deliveries daily

🌿 Support landscape and hydroculture plant maintenance

🌿 Help with loading and unloading goods at work sites

🛠️ Maintain the company vehicle’s cleanliness and mechanical soundness

📋 Submit incident or accident reports promptly

✅ Always comply with LTA regulations and in-house policies

✅ Carry out any other operational duties as assigned


What’s In It For You?

💰 Salary: $2,300 – $2,500 per month

🕘 Working Hours:


Monday to Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Saturday: 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM

📅 Annual Leave: 7 days (plus other statutory leaves like Medical, Hospitalisation, Marriage, Compassionate, and Childcare)

🛡️ Secure and Stable Career: 3-month probation period leading to confirmation

🌟 Great Team Environment: Work closely with dedicated team.

Who We're Looking For

🚗 Valid Singapore Manual Driving License Holder

🚛 Minimum 2–3 years of driving experience

🧹 Good attitude towards vehicle care and team responsibility

🛠️ Physically fit to support loading/unloading operations

📱 Comfortable using mobile communication platforms

🌿 Ready to Drive Change? Apply Now and Grow With Us! 🌿

At OneO2Plants, you're not just a driver — you're a nurturer of life and beauty on every journey!

postedCompany.description:
OneO2Plants PTE. LTD.

Established in 2008, OneO2Plants is a subsidiary of Far East Flora – an integrated floriculture firm with over 40 years of experience. We endeavor to bring life and freshness to the space of every business in Asia by making our extensive range of plants and pots available for rent in your office space.

With our wide variety of plants and European pot designs, OneO2Plants can provide the options and service level you require. We are able to provide plant rental for offices, restaurants, hotels, commercial buildings, shopping malls, and events. Our rapidly growing clientele in Singapore can attest to our quality service, enthusiasm and reliability. With renewable annual rental contracts, our plant nurturers will visit your premises every fortnightly to ensure that your plants stay healthy and fresh throughout the year.

Our other services also include plants for events, plants for purchase and floral arrangements. Whichever service you require, you can be assured that customer satisfaction is our number one priority.
postedCompany.name: ONEO2PLANTS PTE. LTD.
